channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Top-seeded Oregon sees title hopes dashed with early knockout by Ohio State
item.description: PASADENA, Calif. (AP) — Oregon withstood many challenges en route to being the only unbeaten team and the top seed in the College Football Playoff.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Penn State takes simple approach during ride into CFP semifinals
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Football coaches, perhaps more than in other sports, are huge proponents of structure, routine, consistent messaging. Since the early days of his time in Happy Valley, Penn State's James Franklin has adhered to the philosophy of 1-0. Yes, it's a cliche.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ohio State stomps Oregon in Rose Bowl beatdown to advance to CFP semifinal
item.description: Ohio State blew out Oregon 41-21 with a 34-point first half in the Rose Bowl to end their newest conference rival's inaugural season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Targeting no-call at Peach Bowl raises more questions about disputed rule
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The Peach Bowl referee declined to call a targeting penalty late in the fourth quarter for a helmet-to-helmet hit by Texas safety Michael Taaffe that could've given Arizona State a chance to kick a winning field goal in the College Football Playoff quarterfinals Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: PAUL NEWBERRY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 6 Ohio State routs top-ranked Oregon 41-21 in the Rose Bowl, advances to CFP semifinals
item.description: No. 6 Ohio State roared into the College Football Playoff semifinals with a 41-21 victory over No. 1 Oregon in the 111th Rose Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Greg Beacham, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Skattebo's do-it-all show is not enough to overcome Arizona State's 4th-down woes against Texas
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Cam Skattebo's do-it-all offensive show wasn't enough to save Arizona State from a stretch of fourth-down failures against Texas. Led by Skattebo, the senior running back, Arizona State compiled big advantages in rushing yards, total yards and time of possession.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pelicans players, coach grieve those killed in New Orleans attack as they play in Miami
item.description: The New Orleans Pelicans were in Miami when they learned of a deadly terrorist attack in New Orleans' famed French Quarter.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Jimmy Garoppolo to make debut for playoff-bound Rams in place of Matthew Stafford against Seahawks
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Jimmy Garoppolo will take his first snaps for the Rams when he starts in place of Matthew Stafford in playoff-bound Los Angeles' regular-season finale against Seattle on Sunday. Coach Sean McVay announced the decision Wednesday to rest Stafford, the 16-year veteran starter.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Officials postpone Sugar Bowl in the wake of apparent terror attack on Bourbon Street
item.description: The 2025 Sugar Bowl in New Orleans has been postponed just hours before kickoff Wednesday after at least 10 people were killed and dozens more were injured in what federal officials are investigating as an act of terrorism.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chiefs to start Carson Wentz at QB against Denver, which would clinch a playoff berth with a win
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — The Chiefs will start backup Carson Wentz at quarterback on Sunday in Denver in a game that means nothing to Kansas City, which has already clinched the No. 1 seed in the AFC playoffs, but could mean everything to the Broncos.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sugar Bowl official speaks out after deadly Bourbon Street attack leaves at least 10 dead hours before kickoff
item.description: Sugar Bowl CEO Jeff Hundley released a statement Wednesday confirming that they are working with authorities after a driver plowed through a crowd on Bourbon Street in New Orleans, killing at least 10.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Utah HC loses fifth straight game, 4-1 to Edmonton
item.description: EDMONTON (ABC4 Sports) - Connor McDavid and Leon Draisaitl each extended their point streaks to 12 games for the Edmonton Oilers, who won 4-1 against the Utah Hockey Club at Rogers Place on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: No. 5 Penn State bottles up Jeanty, beats No. 8 Boise State 31-14 in Fiesta Bowl
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Penn State defenders clogged every hole, stretched out every outside run, closed with ferocity. Everywhere that Ashton Jeanty turned, he ran into Nittany Lions. The Heisman Trophy runner-up still went over 100 yards, but he sure had to work for it.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Travis Kelce receives most fan votes for 2025 Pro Bowl
item.description: Despite a rather subpar season by his own standards, Chiefs tight end Travis Kelce still managed to receive the most votes for the 2025 Pro Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jordan Chiles flaunts Olympic medal in New Year's post amid ongoing appeal over losing bronze to Romania
item.description: Jordan Chiles posted a photo of the bronze medal from the women's floor exercise final that she was initially awarded before it was stripped
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Quinn Ewers' former Texas teammate posts cryptic message after rumor of $6 million offer for QB to transfer
item.description: Quinn Ewers reportedly has a $6 million offer to transfer out of Texas instead of going pro, but his former teammate said that would be a waste of money.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lamar Jackson vs Josh Allen MVP debate divides NFL media
item.description: The NFL MVP race between Buffalo Bills quarterback Josh Allen and Baltimore Ravens quarterback Lamar Jackson is coming down to the final week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Utes blown out in Big 12 opener by Baylor, 81-56
item.description: WACO, Tex. (AP) - It was a rude awakening to the Big 12 Conference for the Runnin' Utes. V.J. Edgecombe scored 19 points, three other Baylor players had 15 and the 25th-ranked Bears led throughout in an 81-56 win over Utah on Tuesday in the Big 12 opener for both teams.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Dartmouth basketball players end their unionization attempt in anticipation of shifting NLRB
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — The Dartmouth men’s basketball team on Tuesday dropped its attempt to unionize, abruptly ending a push to become the first college athletes to bargain for a contract in order to avoid a potentially damaging precedent from a National Labor Relations Board that soon will be controlled by
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ruben Amorim is 'very excited' about where 14th-place Man United can go in 2025
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Despite his team entering 2025 in 14th place in the Premier League, Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim is “very excited” about the year ahead.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cowboys release Ezekiel Elliott in quiet end to running back's illustrious Dallas career
item.description: FRISCO, Texas (AP) — The Cowboys released running back Ezekiel Elliott on Tuesday, a quiet end to a Dallas career that started with two rushing titles in three seasons but faded quickly from there. The move was the end of Elliott's second stint with the team that drafted him fourth overall in 2016.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Blues dominate Blackhawks 6-2 in Discover NHL Winter Classic
item.description: The St. Louis Blues and Chicago Blackhawks will close the 2024 calendar year with a head-to-head battle outdoors: The NHL Discover Winter Classic.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: NFC's No. 1 seed comes down to Vikings-Lions showdown at Detroit in Week 18
item.description: The NFC’s No. 1 seed will come down to the final game of the regular season when the Detroit Lions host the Minnesota Vikings next Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Saquon Barkley tops 2,000 yards rushing as Eagles beat Cowboys 41-7 to clinch NFC East
item.description: Barkley rushed for 167 yards to top 2,000 on the season, backup quarterback Kenny Pickett ran and threw for scores before departing with injured ribs, and the Eagles clinched the division title by routing the Dallas Cowboys 41-7 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mayfield throws 5 TD passes and Bucs keep playoff, NFC South hopes alive with 48-14 rout of Panthers
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — The Tampa Bay Buccaneers played like a team determined to do whatever's necessary to make the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Dodgers' Ohtani and wife will soon be welcoming a baby to the family
item.description: Between a marriage announcement, third MVP award and World Series title, Los Angeles Dodgers superstar Shohei Ohtani had a pretty good 2024. And now, it looks like 2025 may be even better for the Japanese two-way baseball phenom.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Lehkonen gets hat trick as Colorado beats Utah, 4-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah's struggles on its home ice continue. Artturi Lehkonen scored his first NHL hat trick, and the Colorado Avalanche won 4-1 against the Utah Hockey Club at Delta Center in Salt Lake City on Friday. Utah lost all three games on this current homestand.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bears lose rain-soaked rock fight to the Seahawks, drop franchise record-tying 10th straight game
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bears final home game of the season against the Seattle Seahawks was offense optional, as rain poured down on Soldier Field in what amounted to a cold, wet rock fight. "I thought special teams played very well.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
